summary: Transform indexed agent memory into Mermaid graphs, DOT files, Obsidian vaults, and narrative reports.

scripts.purpose: Export agent-memory index as Mermaid, DOT, or Obsidian-style Markdown vault.
Render a Markdown status report from requirements and ADR entries in docs/agent-memory/index.json.
Export requirements and ADRs into an Obsidian-compatible vault with backlinks and index page.
Generate a standalone HTML dashboard summarizing requirement status from the machine index.

signals: generated files are listed with paths
canonical memory under docs/agent-memory/ is not mutated
node IDs and labels match requirement and ADR IDs from index.json
